name: Eagle Bus Svc
registry_source: NC Secretary of State (via BBB / OpenCorporates listing - sosnc.gov)
notes: FMCSA SAFER returned no records matching 'Eagle Bus Service', 'Eagle Bus', 'Eagle Bus Svc' or 'The Eagle Bus'. BBB profile (A+ accredited 7/25/2025) identifies entity as Eagle Bus Service, Inc. (DBA The Eagle Bus), HQ 7241 Covecreek Dr, Charlotte NC 28215 with PO Box 425, Newell NC 28126. Likely operates intrastate-only with no required USDOT registration. Founding date 11/14/2012 per BBB; company self-reports operating since 2009.

name: Eurotrend Inc Which Will Do
officers: Stan Arutti (CEO, CFO, Secretary, Director, Registered Agent)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for 'Eurotrend' (search returned zero results). CA SOS shows Eurotrend Inc (Doc #3435522, incorporated 12/16/2011) as a General Corporation in active status, BUSINESS ACTIVITY explicitly listed as 'SALE OF CLOTHING' with principal address 6004 Reseda Blvd, Tarzana CA 91356 (Stan Arutti, registered agent). 2211 San Ysidro Dr Beverly Hills is a residential property (Zillow listing) and does NOT appear to be a school bus operator. Source list entry appears to be a misclassification — Eurotrend is a clothing/apparel company, not a student transportation operator. Recommend dropping from tuck-in target list.

name: M & J School Bus Co
fmcsa_address: 130 INGHAM HILL RD, OLD SAYBROOK, CT 06475
registry_source: CT Secretary of the State (via D&B/BBB/Chamber; Connecticut Business Records); FMCSA SAFER
notes: Strong match - FMCSA SAFER legal name 'M & J BUS INC' at same address 130 Ingham Hill Rd, Old Saybrook CT 06475 as input. USDOT 243505 / MC-161949. 696 power units and 506 drivers as of SAFER snapshot; Satisfactory safety rating dated 09/06/2017. Originally founded as M & J Bus Lines, Inc. in 1975 per company history (Michael & Karen Beebe); incorporation date 10/14/1970 per BBB. Phone (860) 388-6782. Active large-fleet school bus and charter operator serving Old Saybrook, Clinton, Granby, Farmington, Windham, Colchester and CREC (Hartford).

name: Lake Country Industries
fmcsa_address: 835 Decatur Ave No, Golden Valley, MN 55427
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (mblsportal.sos.mn.gov) - via OpenCorporates listing
notes: FMCSA confirmed match - Lake Country Industries LLC, USDOT 2454892, MC-1041750, DBA Lake Country Transportation. FMCSA physical address Golden Valley MN differs from input's Loretto MN (9520 County Rd 19 - the Loretto location is the bus terminal/yard per Facebook page). Active operator with 102 power units / 100 drivers serving Twin Cities and Rochester MN for daily school routes. SBA PPP loan ($222,600 January 2021) listed 42 employees. OpenCorporates entity ID ab48700a-25c5-e111-afc0-001ec94ffe7f. Exact MN SOS incorporation date not retrieved (CAPTCHA on OpenCorporates and MN SOS portal); company-formation suggests circa 2011-2012 era based on entity ID timestamp and USDOT issuance.
